label: 134_spending agencies_hr_direct spending_agencies
description: Proposed bills aimed at updating federal laws for the preservation, storage, and management of records. These include measures to address electronic records and employee conduct related to record destruction.

earliest_articles.title: H.R. 5872, Sequestration Transparency Act of 2012
earliest_articles.excerpt: As ordered reported by the House Committee on the Budget on June 27, 2012 H.R. 5872 would require the President to provide a detailed report to the Congress within 30 days of enactment regarding detailed plans for implementing the across-the-board spending cuts for fiscal year 2013 that are required under the Balanced…

earliest_articles.title: H.R. 3609, Taxpayers Right-To-Know Act
earliest_articles.excerpt: As ordered reported by the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform on April 26, 2012 H.R. 3609 would require government agencies to identify and describe each program they administer, the cost to administer the program, expenditures for services, the number of program beneficiaries, and the number of…

newest_articles.title: S. 872, Stop Secret Spending Act of 2025
newest_articles.excerpt: S. 872 would increase the amount of information that the Department of the Treasury must publish each year about certain federal spending. The bill also would direct the Department of the Treasury and the Office of Management and Budget to establish standards to ensure that federal agencies report complete, accurate…

newest_articles.title: S. 81, Guidance Clarity Act of 2025
newest_articles.excerpt: S. 81 would require federal agencies to include text in their guidance documents to clarify that such guidance is not legally binding. Guidance documents typically explain how regulations are interpreted by the agency but do not carry the force of law. Agencies disseminate guidance to the public in memorandums,…

newest_articles.title: H.R. 225, HUD Transparency Act of 2025
newest_articles.excerpt: H.R. 225 would require the Inspector General of the Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD) to testify annually before the Congress on different topics including the sufficiency of the agency’s resources, actions taken to identify opportunities for program improvement, and the inspector general’s ability to…

central_articles.title: H.R. 5170, Federal Records Accountability Act of 2014
central_articles.excerpt: As ordered reported by the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform on July 24, 2014 H.R. 5170 would amend federal laws regarding the collection, storage, and management of federal records. Specifically, the legislation would establish new procedures for suspending and removing federal employees who destroy…

central_articles.title: H.R. 2319, Electronic Message Preservation Act of 2015
central_articles.excerpt: H.R. 2319 would amend federal law concerning the preservation, storage, and management of records by federal agencies. The legislation would direct the National Archives and Records Administration (NARA) to issue regulations governing the preservation of e-mail and other electronic records in electronic format. The…
